title: Add missing [hidden] override for .workspace-rows
action: Add `.workspace-rows[hidden] { display: none; }` to web/src/styles.css, next to the existing `.workspace-rows` rule (styles.css:647-649). Per D1-D3: this is the one place missing the override pattern already used 4 times in this same file for the identical author-vs-UA cascade conflict (`.reply-sheet[hidden]`, `.keys-pad[hidden]`, `.create-sheet[hidden]`, `.dropdown-popup[hidden]`) -- match their comment style citing the mechanism. No JS changes: the click handler (switcher.ts:337-352), aria-expanded toggling, and chevron rotate CSS (styles.css:572-581) are already correct and must not be touched.

truths: Clicking a .workspace-header with 2+ groups visually hides its .workspace-rows list when collapsed, and shows it again when expanded (not just the aria-expanded attribute)

artifacts.substantive: adds one .workspace-rows[hidden] rule with a comment naming the cascade-origin mechanism, matching the 4 existing precedents

prohibitions: No change to .workspace-chevron rotate rule or transition
No change to .workspace-chevron-wrap status decor from PBI-052
